svg.title: Daily Brief example
svg.desc: An illustrative Daily Brief with follow-up, connections, blind spots, today's tasks, a learning item and a question. All content is fictional.
svg.text: “Ship onboarding emails” (done) — measure the open rate before writing email #4.
“Refactor billing webhook” still open since Monday — the priority: it blocks launch.
“Users churn after day 2” + goal “reach 50 paying users” → instrument activation,
not just signups. The onboarding flow is the lever.
You name growth as the priority — but 4 of your 5 open tasks are infrastructure.
[Projects] Add an activation event to onboarding — measures the day-2 drop.
[Work] Send the billing-webhook fix for review — unblocks the paid launch.
[Health] 30-min zone-2 run — recovery day in your plan.
Postgres partial indexes — your webhook query scans the whole events table.
What single metric tells you the product is “working” — and are you tracking it today?
Illustrative example — fictional content. Your real brief is generated from your own Notion.
